---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for PlotMate
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when ..."

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Use case

How would this feature fit into your filmmaking or storyboarding workflow?

## Additional context

Mockups, screenshots, references to other tools, or anything else that helps explain the request.
